text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Feast your eyes on this, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: This outfit just screams, "super lucky<n>final form"!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Ta-dah!
choice_data_list: Looks like your normal signature racewear to me.
Looks like your normal signature racewear to me.

text_block_list.text:
Hey, don't say that. I went out of my<n>way to put
this on. Would it hurt to act<n>a little more
impressed?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
However, it is in need of a few more<n>finishing
touches.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's lacking in spiritual power! An<n>outfit with no
luck is nothing but a<n>vessel.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Which means we need to imbue this<n>thing with
spiritual power! First up,<n>we're visiting the most
sacred site in<n>the whole academy!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
At the very end of the corridor, there<n>is a sign that
reads "Student Council<n>Office."

This room is a mystical spot only a<n>chosen few
may enter!

Right at the very back of this office<n>lies a certain
sacred treasure.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Yes, a piece of paper blessed with<n>divinity that
grants power beyond<n>your wildest dreams!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Should you read the holy verse<n>before a race...
motivation will<n>overflow within you. It'll be coming
out of your ears!

All right... The coast is clear, right?<n>Doesn't look
like anyone's around.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: I'm just gonna take a quick peek...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Hey, you don't have to put it like that.

Let's call it... a silent pilgrimage! A<n>ritual that
evades the gaze of the<n>gods!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: ...Not buying it, huh? Haha...

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Trainer, I beg of thee! Avert your eyes<n>from my
actions, please?

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
I'm so grateful to hear you say that!<n>Our hearts
move as one! My crimes<n>are your crimes!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Found it! This is it! The school motto<n>that
encapsulates what every<n>Umamusume should
strive to be!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
The framed parchment on the wall<n>reads, "Eclipse
first, the rest<n>nowhere."

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that's a saying for the books...<n>Before we
depart, let us fill ourselves<n>with its spiritual power.

Having received guidance from the<n>teachings of
Tracen Academy,<n>Matikanefukukitaru seems
satisfied.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Now that we've got what we came<n>for, let's
make our retreat—

text_block_list.name: Narita Brian
text_block_list.text: Hey. You've got some nerve<n>trespassing here.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: V-Vice Prez Narita Brian?!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
It's not what you think! This was<n>just a
spur-of-the-moment kind of<n>thing. I didn't mean
anything bad by<n>it, so I don't suppose you could
look<n>the other way...
You're busted no matter where I look.

Gyaaah! You'd judge me without<n>even looking?!
You're brutal!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Narita Brian reprimands her harshly.<n>Nonetheless,
Matikanefukukitaru<n>succeeds in powering up her
signature racewear.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
When did you become such a party<n>pooper?! Well,
I'm not giving up that<n>ea—
Ack, stop pulling me!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Later, we get permission from Vice<n>President Air
Groove to enter the<n>student council office.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Oh, this is it! The school motto that<n>encapsulates
what every<n>Umamusume should strive to be!

The sacred parchment, the giver of<n>unprecedented
power! Hey, that<n>sounded kind of cool.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
Eclipse first, the rest nowhere. Gosh,<n>I'm getting
chills!

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text: Wait, what's an eclipse? Does it go<n>in your hair?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Sigh. Unbelievable... Are you sayingthe meaning of this teaching evadesyou?

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: Allow me to set your heart and mind<n>straight.

text_block_list.name: Matikanefukukitaru
text_block_list.text:
No need, thanks! Even if I don't have<n>a clue what
it means, the vibes are<n>enough!

text_block_list.name: Air Groove
text_block_list.text: ...Not so fast. Stay right where you<n>are.

Matikanefukukitaru gets lectured by<n>Air Groove
for a good while, but it<n>seems like she learns quite
a bit.
